pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page introducing the academic research organization and providing quick access to conferences, publications, researchers, events, membership, and support options. Includes featured content from across the site and compact personalized widgets.
primary_functions: Introduce the organizations mission, focus areas, and key programs
Provide prominent links to Conferences, Publications, Researchers, Events & Workshops, Membership, Donate, and Newsletters
Highlight featured upcoming conferences, key workshops, and recent publications
Offer quick access widgets or callouts to My Account sections such as My Schedule and Reading List

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View all conferences' call-to-action or main navigation link
Submit global search form with a publications-focused query
Use a homepage shortcut such as 'Find experts' with a keyword
Click on 'More workshops & events' from featured events section
Click on a featured conference card
Click on a featured event/workshop card
Click on a recent publication title in homepage highlights
Click on 'Become a member' call-to-action
Click on 'Support early-career research' or 'Donate' call-to-action
Click on 'Subscribe to newsletters' widget
Click on 'Go to My Account' from personalized widgets

access_methods.description: Default landing page when accessing the site or clicking 'Home' in the header
Users can navigate directly via URL or external links to the root/index page

pages.name: Conferences & Calls
pages.description: Listing and search hub for all conferences organized or supported by the organization, with rich filtering/sorting capabilities and integration with conference details and bookmarks.
primary_functions: Browse, search, and filter conferences by region, date range, topic/track, and attendee type
Filter conferences by registration fee and maximum price for specific attendee types (e.g., Student)
Sort conference results by start date, relevance, or other criteria
Open individual conference detail pages for full information and bookmarking

incoming_params.description: Optional keyword query to pre-populate the conference search (e.g., 'artificial intelligence').
Optional region filter code (e.g., 'europe') to pre-filter conferences.
Optional ISO date string for conference search start date filter.
Optional ISO date string for conference search end date filter.
Optional topic keyword for pre-filtering conferences (e.g., 'artificial intelligence').
Optional attendee type code such as 'student' or 'professional' to preselect fee filters.
Optional maximum registration fee to prefill the fee filter.
Optional currency code for fee filtering.
Optional sort code such as 'start_date_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a conference title or 'View details' in the conferences results list
Click 'Contact us about this conference series' or similar support links

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Conferences' main navigation link
Linked from homepage highlights and other cross-site references to conferences
Pre-filtered access via query parameters (e.g., region or topic) from other pages

pages.name: Conference Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific conference, including overview, fees, bookmarks, and a program/schedule tab for building a personal agenda.
primary_functions: Display full conference information including title, dates, location, tracks, fees, and key deadlines
Provide a Program/Schedule tab with day selector, session list, and filters (e.g., by keyword such as 'climate', by time, by track)
Allow users to add individual sessions to their personal schedule or agenda
Allow users to bookmark/save the conference to their My Account for later reference

incoming_params.description: Conference ID specifying which conference to display.
Optional 1-based day index used to deep-link to a specific conference day in the program tab.
Optional session ID to highlight a particular session within the schedule.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View my schedule' from within the Program/Schedule tab
Click on 'Back to all conferences' link
Click on a speaker's name in a session listing

access_methods.description: Accessed with a conference ID parameter from listings, homepage highlights, or My Account bookmarks
Direct links from related conferences on publications or researcher profiles

pages.name: Researchers Directory
pages.description: Searchable directory of researchers affiliated with or indexed by the organization, with filters for geography, expertise, and metrics.
primary_functions: Search researchers by keywords (e.g., 'machine learning healthcare')
Filter researchers by country or affiliation location, metrics (e.g., h-index range), and expertise/keywords
Display a list of matching researchers with brief profile snippets highlighting key topics
Link to individual researcher profile pages for more detailed information and actions

incoming_params.description: Optional search query (e.g., 'machine learning healthcare') to pre-populate the directory search.
Optional country code or label to pre-filter researchers by location (e.g., 'Canada').
Optional minimum h-index filter value.
Optional maximum h-index filter value.
Optional expertise keyword for pre-filtering (e.g., 'machine learning for healthcare').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a researcher name in search results
Click 'Need help finding collaborators?' support link

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Researchers' main navigation link
Linked from featured researcher spotlights or related content on other pages
Can be opened with pre-filled filters using URL parameters

pages.name: Researcher Profile
pages.description: Detail page for a specific researcher, showing biography, expertise, metrics, selected work, and the ability to follow/unfollow them.
primary_functions: Display researcher biography, affiliations, research areas, and metrics such as h-index
Highlight key topics such as 'machine learning for healthcare' and relevant keywords
List selected publications, talks, or conferences associated with the researcher
Allow users to follow or unfollow the researcher and add them to their Followed Researchers list in My Account

incoming_params.description: Researcher ID specifying which profile to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View all followed researchers' after following someone
Click 'View all publications by this researcher'
Click 'Find related conferences' from the profile

access_methods.description: Accessed with a researcher ID parameter from the directory, related lists, or My Account
Linked from conference sessions and publication author lists

pages.name: Publications & Papers
pages.description: Search and discovery page for publications, reports, and academic papers, with filters suited to policy and impact-focused research.
primary_functions: Search publications by keywords (e.g., 'renewable energy policy')
Filter results by publication year range, access type (including Open Access), and journal impact factor range
Sort publications by recency, relevance, or impact factor
Open individual publication detail pages and support adding publications to a personal reading list

incoming_params.description: Optional search query (e.g., 'renewable energy policy') to initialize the search results.
Optional start year for filtering publications.
Optional end year for filtering publications.
Optional access type filter code (e.g., 'open_access').
Optional minimum journal impact factor filter value.
Optional sort code (e.g., 'year_desc').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a publication title in the search results
Click on 'View My Reading List' link from the publications page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Publications' main navigation link
Linked from homepage recent publications and other cross-site references
Can be accessed with pre-defined query and filter parameters from other pages

pages.name: Publication Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single publication or paper with full metadata, access options, and integration with related content and the user's reading list.
primary_functions: Display publication metadata including title, authors, abstract, journal, year, impact factor, and access type
Provide links to full text or download options where available (especially for Open Access items)
Allow users to add or remove the publication from their Reading List / Saved Publications in My Account
Show related publications, conferences, or researchers connected to this work

incoming_params.description: Publication ID of the item to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Go to My Reading List' after adding a publication
Click 'View more on this topic' to explore similar publications
Click on a related conference link listed for the publication
Click on an author name to search for their profile

access_methods.description: Accessed via publication ID from search results, related lists, or My Account reading list
Linked from homepage recent publications or researcher profiles

pages.name: Events & Workshops
pages.description: Listing and search page for workshops, seminars, webinars, and other events relevant to the organization's research and policy programs.
primary_functions: Search events by keyword (e.g., 'data visualization')
Filter events by type (e.g., Workshop), duration (e.g., Half-day), date, and fee or price range
Display event cards or list items with basic information such as title, date, duration, and fee
Open individual event or workshop detail pages for full information and registration

incoming_params.description: Optional keyword query to pre-populate the event search (e.g., 'data visualization').
Optional event type filter code (e.g., 'workshop').
Optional duration filter code (e.g., 'half_day').
Optional maximum fee filter (numeric amount).
Optional currency code for fee filtering.
Optional start date for event search window (ISO string).
Optional end date for event search window (ISO string).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event or workshop title in the results list
Click 'Questions about this event series?' support link

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Events & Workshops' main navigation link
Linked from homepage featured workshops and program descriptions
Supports pre-filtered access via URL parameters for type, duration, and fee

pages.name: Event / Workshop Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific event or workshop, including agenda, time slots, fees, and guest or account-based registration flow.
primary_functions: Show full event information including description, agenda, duration, time slots, and pricing
Provide a registration or pre-registration flow, including a 'Guest' or 'Register without account' option
Allow users to select a preferred time slot (e.g., morning session) when multiple options are available
Present and submit a registration form capturing name, email, affiliation, and payment preference (e.g., pay on-site or invoice later)

incoming_params.description: Event ID specifying which event or workshop detail to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to all workshops & events'
Click 'Contact us about this workshop' if registration help is needed

access_methods.description: Accessed via event ID from the Events & Workshops listing or homepage highlights
Linked from email campaigns or external promotion of specific workshops

pages.name: Newsletter Subscriptions
pages.description: Page for subscribing to and managing newsletter and email update preferences for topics like AI ethics and climate policy.
primary_functions: Capture an email address for newsletter subscriptions
Allow users to select specific newsletter topics such as 'AI Ethics' and 'Climate Policy'
Set frequency preferences (e.g., Weekly) per selected newsletter topic
Choose email format (e.g., HTML vs. plain text) and submit or update subscription preferences

incoming_params.description: Optional email address used to pre-populate the subscription form and load existing preferences.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Return to homepage' after saving newsletter preferences

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Newsletters' link in the footer
Linked from homepage callouts and program pages promoting specific newsletters
Can be opened with an 'email' parameter to fetch existing subscriptions for that address

pages.name: Donate / Support Us
pages.description: Donation page for supporting the organization and its programs, including targeted funds like Early Career Research Grants.
primary_functions: Let users choose donation type (e.g., One-time) and enter a specific donation amount
Allow selection of a fund or program to support (e.g., 'Early Career Research Grants')
Offer an option to make the donation anonymous and set communication preferences (e.g., no postal mail)
Collect essential donor information (name and email) and proceed to a review step without requiring payment entry on this page

incoming_params.description: Optional donation program ID to preselect a specific fund (e.g., Early Career Research Grants).
Optional suggested donation amount to prefill the amount field.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Return to homepage' after creating a donation draft or cancelling
Click 'Questions about donations?' support link

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Support Us' main navigation link
Accessible via the 'Support Us' link in the footer
Linked from About and program pages encouraging donations to specific funds
Can be opened with preselected program and amount via URL parameters

pages.name: Membership Overview
pages.description: Overview and comparison page for membership plans, including Student and Professional tiers with pricing and key benefits.
primary_functions: Present and compare membership plans such as Student and Professional with prices and benefit lists
Highlight key benefits including 'access to member-only webinars' and 'discounted conference fees' for each plan
Help users identify the most economical plan that still includes specific key benefits
Provide 'Apply' or 'Join' buttons that lead to the membership application form for the selected plan

incoming_params.description: Optional plan type to highlight on load (e.g., 'student' or 'professional').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Apply' or 'Join' for a specific membership plan
Click 'Support us without becoming a member' link
Click 'Questions about membership?' support link

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Membership' main navigation link
Linked from About and program pages describing member benefits
Supports highlighting a specific plan through URL parameters

pages.name: Membership Application
pages.description: Application form for joining the organization under a selected membership plan. Handles the initial data capture before payment.
primary_functions: Display the chosen membership plan details (e.g., Student or Professional) and associated eligibility criteria
Collect applicant information such as full name, email, country, and relevant status/role (e.g., Student or Professional)
Validate that entered information aligns with the selected plan where necessary
Allow users to continue to the next step of the membership process without requiring payment details on this page

incoming_params.description: Membership plan ID that the user chose to apply for.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Change plan' from within the application form

access_methods.description: Accessed via membership plan selection with a planId parameter
Continues the membership process after submitting initial applicant details

pages.name: My Account & Saved Items
pages.description: Central hub for the user’s personalized content, including schedule, bookmarks, reading list, followed researchers, and quick navigation to manage them.
primary_functions: Show a 'My Schedule' or 'Personal Agenda' section listing sessions the user has added from conference programs
Display bookmarked or saved conferences for quick access and future reference
Provide a 'My Reading List' or 'Saved Publications' section showing all publications added from publication detail pages
List all Followed Researchers and allow users to manage (view/unfollow) them
Offer quick navigation or tabs to jump directly to sections such as schedule, reading list, and followed researchers from links like My Schedule or My Reading List

incoming_params.description: Optional section identifier determining which tab to open by default. Expected values include 'my_schedule', 'bookmarks', 'reading_list', or 'followed_researchers'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a bookmarked conference title
Click on a scheduled session to view it in the conference program
Click on a publication title in My Reading List
Click on a followed researcher name
Click 'Find more conferences' from the bookmarks or schedule section
Click 'Discover more publications' from the reading list section
Click 'Explore more researchers' from the followed researchers section

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'My Account' main navigation link
Accessible via 'My Schedule' and 'My Reading List' header links using the section query parameter
Supports deep-linking to a specific section via the 'section' URL parameter
Linked from success messages after bookmarking, scheduling, following, or saving items

pages.name: About the Organization
pages.description: Informational page about the academic research organization, including mission, history, focus areas, and leadership, with links to membership and donation options.
primary_functions: Explain the organizations mission, history, and key focus areas
Describe major programs such as conferences, research initiatives, and early career support
Introduce governance, advisory boards, or leadership where relevant
Provide links to related pages such as Membership, Donate, and Contact

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Become a member' in the membership or community section
Click 'Support Early Career Research Grants' call-to-action
Click 'View our conferences' link
Click 'Contact us' for general inquiries link

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'About' link in the footer
Linked from external sites to describe the organization

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Page for contacting the organization for support, questions, or collaboration, including topic-specific contact information and a general inquiry form.
primary_functions: Provide contact details such as email addresses, phone numbers, and mailing addresses
Offer a simple contact form for inquiries related to conferences, publications, membership, or donations
Route users to helpful resources or FAQs where appropriate
Clarify response times or support hours

incoming_params.description: Optional topic code (e.g., 'conferences', 'publications', 'membership', 'donations') used to preselect the inquiry topic.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Return to homepage' or logo after submitting a contact form

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Contact' link in the footer
Linked from help links on other pages when users need assistance
Supports pre-populating the inquiry topic via URL parameter

pages.name: Policies & Terms
pages.description: Legal and policy information for website usage, data handling, and program-specific terms such as donations and memberships.
primary_functions: Present the websites terms of use and acceptable use guidelines
Explain the privacy policy, including how personal data (e.g., email, registration details) is handled
Describe cookie usage and any consent mechanisms
Include donation and membership-related policies such as refund or cancellation terms where applicable

incoming_params.description: Optional policy code (e.g., 'privacy_policy', 'terms_of_use', 'donation_policy', 'membership_policy') used to scroll or focus to a specific document.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us about this policy' from within a policy document

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Policies & Terms' link in the footer
Linked from consent prompts, forms, and program pages referencing specific policies
Supports deep-linking to specific policy documents via the 'doc' parameter

header_links.description: View and filter events, workshops, and seminars
Make a donation to support research programs
Access personal schedule, bookmarks, reading list, and followed researchers
View your saved publications and reading list

footer_links.description: Get in touch with the organization
Donate to research programs and grants
View privacy policy, terms of use, and related policies
